data.name: Geometry
data.description: Geometry to store a new attribute with the given name on

data.name: Geometry
data.description: Geometry to store a new attribute with the given name on

data.name: Frame
data.label: Figure Out Point Count Along XYZ

data.name: Grid Node Size
data.description: This is driven by the simulation this input is assigned to.

data.name: Sampling Factor
data.description: Creates more particles but doesn't change the simulation resolution.

data.name: Random
data.description: Control the magnitude of random offsets.

data.name: Object Type
data.description: Depending on the type, different parameters are available.

data.name: Density
data.description: Density of the material in kg/m^3

data.name: Young's Modulus
data.description: Stiffness of the material in Pascal, i.e. kg/m/s^2

data.name: Poisson's Ratio
data.description: How volume conserving the material should be.

data.name: Exponent
data.description: How sharp resistance to compression ramps up.

data.name: Bulk Modulus
data.description: Stiffness of the material in Pascal, i.e. kg/m/s^2

data.name: Viscosity Dynamic
data.description: Shearing resistance in Pascal per second, i.e., kg/m/s

data.name: Viscosity Bulk
data.description: Volume change resistance in Pascal per second, i.e., kg/m/s

data.name: Sand Alpha Value
data.description: Shear limit before material gives way.

data.name: Initial Velocity Linear
data.description: Initial linear velocity in world space.

data.name: Initial Velocity Angular
data.description: Initial angular velocity (wrt. object position) in world space.
